label: Sinai Georgian NF frag 68a, Undertext (Christian Palestinian Aramaic)

bib.citation: Duensing, Hugo. Nachlese christlich-palästinisch aramäischer Fragmente, NAWG, phil.-hist. Kl. 5. Göttingen: Vandenhoeck & Ruprecht, 1955
Desreumaux, Alain. “Ephraim in Christian Palestinian Aramaic.” In Hugoye 1 (1998)

Brock, Sebastian P. “Sinai: A Meeting Point of Georgian with Syriac and Christian Palestinian Aramaic.” In Caucasus: Between East and West. Historical and Philological Studies in Honour of Zaza Aleksidze, 482-494. Tbilisi: National Centre of Manuscripts, 2012

Müller-Kessler, Christa. “Piecing together Christian Palestinian Aramaic Texts under Georgian Manuscripts (St Petersburg, NLR, Syr. 16; Sinai, Georg. NF 19, 71; Oslo, Martin Schøyen MS 35, 37; Princeton, Garrett MS 24; Göttingen, Syr. 17, 19, 23, 25).” Digital Kartvelology 1 (2022): 1-25

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.

cataloguer.message: Description and identification of undertexts as part of SPP (2011-2016). Migrated to SMDL in 2025.
